7:["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-warning","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L26",null,{"ref":"$undefined","iconNode":[["path",{"d":"m21.73 18-8-14a2 2 0 0 0-3.48 0l-8 14A2 2 0 0 0 4 21h16a2 2 0 0 0 1.73-3","key":"wmoenq"}],["path",{"d":"M12 9v4","key":"juzpu7"}],["path",{"d":"M12 17h.01","key":"p32p05"}]],"className":"lucide-triangle-alert shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"Same-Machine Only"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":["Mnemosyne's multi-agent sharing works via the same SQLite database file on the same filesystem. For cross-machine sharing, use the MCP SSE server (",["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne mcp --transport sse --port 8080"}],") or manual export/import."]}]}]]}]]}]}]
8:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Architecture"}]
9:["$","$L27",null,{"chart":"\ngraph TB\n  subgraph Team[\"Agent Team\"]\n      A1[Agent A]\n      A2[Agent B]\n      A3[Agent C]\n  end\n  \n  subgraph Storage[\"Storage\"]\n      DBA[(Agent A DB)]\n      DBB[(Agent B DB)]\n      DBC[(Agent C DB)]\n      DBS[(Shared DB)]\n  end\n  \n  A1 -->|private| DBA\n  A2 -->|private| DBB\n  A3 -->|private| DBC\n  A1 -->|shared| DBS\n  A2 -->|shared| DBS\n  A3 -->|shared| DBS\n"}]
a:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Separate Database Instances"}]
b:["$","p",null,{"children":["Each agent gets its own ",["$","code",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne"}]," instance. Use separate ",["$","code",null,{"children":"db_path"}]," values for isolation, or share a path for coordination:"]}]
c:["$","$L28",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import Mnemosyne\n\n# Each agent has its own isolated database\nagent_a = Mnemosyne(\n  session_id=\"agent-a\",\n  db_path=\"/data/agent-a/memories.db\",\n)\n\nagent_b = Mnemosyne(\n  session_id=\"agent-b\",\n  db_path=\"/data/agent-b/memories.db\",\n)\n\n# Agent A stores an observation\nagent_a.remember(\n  content=\"The API rate limit is 1000 req/min.\",\n  source=\"observation\",\n  importance=0.9,\n)\n\n# Agent B cannot see Agent A's memories\nresults = agent_b.recall(\"API rate limit\")  # Returns nothing from agent-a's DB\n","language":"python"}]
d:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Shared Memory with Identity (since v2.3)"}]
e:["$","p",null,{"children":["Every agent gets its own ",["$","code",null,{"children":"author_id"}]," and shares a ",["$","code",null,{"children":"channel_id"}],". Memories are auto-tagged with who stored them:"]}]
f:["$","$L28",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import Mnemosyne\n\n# Agent A: Abdias (human user)\nabdias = Mnemosyne(\n  session_id=\"abdias-session\",\n  author_id=\"abdias\",\n  author_type=\"human\",\n  channel_id=\"fluxspeak-team\",\n)\n\n# Agent B: Codex (AI agent)\ncodex = Mnemosyne(\n  session_id=\"codex-session\",\n  author_id=\"codex\",\n  author_type=\"agent\",\n  channel_id=\"fluxspeak-team\",\n)\n\n# Abdias stores a preference\nabdias.remember(\"Dark mode is preferred\", importance=0.9)\n\n# Codex stores a deploy result\ncodex.remember(\"Deploy succeeded at 3PM\", importance=0.8)\n","language":"python"}]
10:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Recalling in a Channel"}]
11:["$","p",null,{"children":["With ",["$","code",null,{"children":"channel_id"}],", agents in different sessions see each other's memories:"]}]
12:["$","$L28",null,{"code":"# Abdias asks: what happened in the team channel?\nresults = abdias.recall(\"deploy\", channel_id=\"fluxspeak-team\")\n# Returns Codex's deploy memory!\n\n# Codex asks: any user preferences?\nresults = codex.recall(\"dark\", channel_id=\"fluxspeak-team\")\n# Returns Abdias's preference!\n","language":"python"}]
13:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Filtering by Author"}]
14:["$","p",null,{"children":["Need to know who said what? Filter by ",["$","code",null,{"children":"author_id"}]," or ",["$","code",null,{"children":"author_type"}],":"]}]
15:["$","$L28",null,{"code":"# What did Abdias specifically store?\nresults = abdias.recall(\"preference\", author_id=\"abdias\")\n\n# What did all agents (not humans) store?\nresults = abdias.recall(\"deploy\", author_type=\"agent\")\n\n# How many memories does Abdias have?\nstats = abdias.get_stats(author_id=\"abdias\")\n# How many in the whole channel?\nstats = abdias.get_stats(channel_id=\"fluxspeak-team\")\n","language":"python"}]
16:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Cross-Machine Sharing via MCP"}]
17:["$","p",null,{"children":"Run the MCP SSE server on one machine and connect agents from any machine on the network:"}]
18:["$","$L28",null,{"code":"# Machine A: Start the MCP server\nmnemosyne mcp --transport sse --port 8080 --bank team\n\n# Machine B: Connect an agent with identity\nMNEMOSYNE_AUTHOR_ID=agent-b \\\nMNEMOSYNE_AUTHOR_TYPE=agent \\\nMNEMOSYNE_CHANNEL_ID=team \\\nyour-mcp-client --url http://machine-a:8080/sse\n","language":"bash"}]
19:["$","p",null,{"children":"Any MCP-compatible client (Claude Desktop, Goose, Cursor, etc.) can connect. Memories are shared across the network through the server."}]
1a:["$","p",null,{"children":"For offline or batch transfer, use export/import:"}]
1b:["$","$L28",null,{"code":"# On machine A: export shared memories\nagent_a.export_to_file(\"/shared/team-memory-export.json\")\n\n# On machine B: import\nagent_b.import_from_file(\"/shared/team-memory-export.json\")\n","language":"python"}]
1c:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Deployment"}]
1d:["$","p",null,{"children":"Use a shared volume or network filesystem:"}]
1e:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Docker"}],": Named volume mounted to all agents"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Kubernetes"}],": Shared PVC"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Fly.io"}],": Same volume mounted to multiple machines"]}],"\n"]}]
1f:["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-warning","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L26",null,{"ref":"$undefined","iconNode":"$7:props:children:props:children:0:props:iconNode","className":"lucide-triangle-alert shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"SQLite Concurrency"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":"SQLite handles multiple readers well but prefers single-writer. For high-write multi-agent scenarios, consider WAL mode or connection pooling."}]}]]}]]}]}]
